title: Understanding and Analyzing Your Costs with Google Cloud Billing Reports
description: This is a self-paced lab that takes place in the Google Cloud console. In this lab, you familiarize yourself with Google Cloud Billing reports, which provides built-in cost reporting for GCP within the Google Cloud Console. You view Billing reports from a live billing account, understand current and forecasted GCP costs, and then analyze costs using report filters to identify cost drivers and trends
